title: Query Template Matching Flow
description: Flowchart showing how a chatbot matches a question to a SQL query template, extracts and validates parameters, executes the query, and formats the response.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Trace how a natural language question is matched to a SQL query template
Explain how parameters are extracted, validated, and converted to query values
Describe the error and clarification paths that keep template matching safe
